chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7846 OF 2022 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ 1.For hearing of Misc.No.33233/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 17-12-2024. Mr.Sardar M. Ishaque, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Amir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent No.2 Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. --- Per learned counsel for Respondent No.2 (Tax Department) the subject proceedings are not maintainable as relevant assessment order has already been passed. In view of hereof, while the petitioner remains at liberty to seek remedy pursuant to statutory remedial hierarchy and no case is made out to entertain this matter in writ jurisdiction. Petition is dismissed as not maintainable. Judge Judge nasir
